data.title: FingerMotion Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

FingerMotion ( (FNGR) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 30, 2025, FingerMotion reported its financial results for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2025, revealing a slight decrease in annual revenue to $35.61 million. Despite a decline in telecommunications revenue, the company saw significant growth in its SMS & MMS business and initial revenues from its DaGe and C2 platforms, reflecting its strategic focus on platform development and market expansion.

Spark’s Take on FNGR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FNGR is a Neutral.

FingerMotion’s overall stock score reflects significant challenges in financial performance, with negative profitability and cash flow issues weighing heavily on the score. However, the recent corporate event of securing key contracts suggests potential for future growth and expansion. The technical analysis indicates a neutral position, while valuation concerns persist due to negative earnings. Overall, the company’s strategic moves in securing contracts could offset some financial challenges if successfully executed.

To see Spark’s full report on FNGR stock, click here.

More about FingerMotion

FingerMotion operates in the telecommunications industry, focusing on products and services such as SMS & MMS, and platforms like DaGe and Command & Communication (C2). The company is committed to growth through platform development and market diversification.

Average Trading Volume: 681,466

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $169.1M

data.title: Capital Metals Closes WRAP Retail Offer Early Amid High Demand
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Capital Metals plc ( (GB:CMET) ) has shared an announcement.

Capital Metals PLC has announced the early closure of its WRAP Retail Offer due to higher-than-anticipated demand. This development underscores strong investor interest and could potentially enhance the company’s financial position as it progresses towards the mine development stage of its Taprobane Minerals Project in Sri Lanka.

More about Capital Metals plc

Capital Metals PLC is a UK-based company listed on the London Stock Exchange, focusing on the development of the Taprobane Minerals Project in Sri Lanka. The project is known for its high-grade mineral sands, including ilmenite, rutile, zircon, and garnet, and is positioned as one of the highest-grade mineral sands projects globally. The company aims to implement modern mining practices and contribute positively to the local economy by creating jobs and generating significant government revenue.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

An update from EOG Resources ( (EOG) ) is now available.

On May 30, 2025, EOG Resources announced a definitive agreement to acquire Encino Acquisition Partners for $5.6 billion, enhancing its position in the Utica shale play. This acquisition is expected to be immediately accretive to EOG’s financial metrics, expanding its multi-basin portfolio and increasing its production capacity, while also supporting a 5% increase in regular dividends.

American Tower ( (AMT) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 30, 2025, American Tower Corporation successfully completed a public offering of 500 million euros in senior unsecured notes due 2032, generating net proceeds of approximately 496.8 million euros. The company plans to use these funds to repay existing debt and for general corporate purposes, potentially impacting its financial flexibility and market positioning. The notes, which bear an interest rate of 3.625% per annum, include covenants that limit certain corporate actions and provide options for redemption under specific conditions, reflecting strategic financial management to maintain stability and investor confidence.

American Tower Corporation operates in the telecommunications industry, primarily focusing on owning, operating, and developing multitenant communications real estate, including wireless and broadcast towers. The company plays a significant role in providing infrastructure for wireless communications and is a key player in the global telecommunications market.

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

CMBC Capital Holdings Limited ( (HK:1141) ) has shared an announcement.

CMBC Capital Holdings Limited announced a proposed change of auditor, with PricewaterhouseCoopers set to retire at the upcoming annual general meeting in June 2025. The company plans to appoint KPMG as the new auditor, aligning with its controlling shareholder, China Minsheng Banking Corp., Ltd., to enhance audit efficiency. The decision, recommended by the audit committee, is based on KPMG’s industry reputation, independence, and technical competence, and is deemed beneficial for the company and its shareholders.

More about CMBC Capital Holdings Limited

CMBC Capital Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, primarily involved in financial services. It operates as part of a group with its subsidiaries and is controlled by China Minsheng Banking Corp., Ltd., focusing on enhancing audit efficiency and aligning its operations with its controlling shareholder.

Japan Gold ( (TSE:JG) ) has provided an announcement.

Japan Gold Corp. announced the expiration of a previously announced private placement and the termination of the engagement letter with agents. The company also issued 384,615 restricted share units to its newly appointed VP of Exploration, Mr. Jason Letto, under its 2023 Equity Incentive Plan. This move reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its leadership and operational capabilities, potentially impacting its exploration and discovery activities in Japan.

The company’s future prospects hinge on successful transition to production and revenue generation.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:JG stock, click here.

More about Japan Gold

Japan Gold Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on discovering high-grade epithermal gold deposits across Japan. It holds a significant portfolio of tenements in areas with known gold occurrences and has an alliance with Barrick Gold Corporation for joint exploration and development. The company is supported by significant shareholders such as Equinox Partners Investment Management LLC and Newmont Corporation.

Modine ( (MOD) ) has provided an announcement.

On May 29, 2025, Modine Manufacturing Company announced a merger agreement with LBW Holding Corp., under which LBW Holding will become a wholly owned subsidiary of Modine. The transaction, valued at approximately $112 million, is expected to close by May 31, 2025, and aims to enhance Modine’s market position in climate solutions. The acquisition is anticipated to be accretive to earnings per share and will be funded through cash on hand and existing credit facilities, with no financing conditions or regulatory reviews required for closing.

The most recent analyst rating on (MOD) stock is a Buy with a $120.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Modine stock, see the MOD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MOD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MOD is a Outperform.

Modine demonstrates strong financial performance and a positive earnings call outlook, particularly in its Climate Solutions and data center segments. However, the stock’s technical indicators suggest caution, and its valuation is relatively high, which may limit upside potential. Continued strategic growth and strong financial management position Modine well, but challenges in certain segments and market conditions should be monitored.

To see Spark’s full report on MOD stock, click here.

More about Modine

Modine Manufacturing Company operates in the heating and climate solutions industry, providing a range of products such as propane, natural gas, and kerosene heaters for agricultural, construction, and greenhouse environments. The company is known for its expertise in heating design and manufacturing, with a strong market presence in agriculture and portable climate solutions.
